parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
CODE_ROOT="{{$env.CODE_ROOT || '/app'}}"
DATA_ROOT="{{$env.DATA_ROOT || '/data'}}"
TENANT_SCHEMA="$CODE_ROOT/specs/tenant_runtime_state_schema.v1.json"
JOB_SCHEMA="$CODE_ROOT/specs/job_runtime_state_schema.v1.json"
missing=""
for f in "$TENANT_SCHEMA" "$JOB_SCHEMA"; do
  if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
    if [ -n "$missing" ]; then missing="$missing, "; fi
    missing="$missing$f"
  fi
done
if [ -n "$missing" ]; then
  echo "{\"status\":\"hard_failure\",\"code\":\"missing_input_schemas\",\"message\":\"Required schema files are missing\",\"missing\":\"$missing\"}"
  exit 1
fi
node -e "const fs=require('fs');JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8'));JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[2],'utf8'));process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:'ok',tenant_schema:process.argv[1],job_schema:process.argv[2]}));" "$TENANT_SCHEMA" "$JOB_SCHEMA"

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const out = $node['Assert Shared Schemas'].json.stdout || '{}'; let parsed; try { parsed = JSON.parse(out); } catch (e) { parsed = { status: 'hard_failure', code: 'invalid_schema_files', message: out || 'schema parse failed' }; } return { status: 'hard_failure', reason: 'missing_or_invalid_schemas', code: parsed.code || 'invalid_schema_files', details: parsed }; })() }}

parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
CODE_ROOT="{{$env.CODE_ROOT || '/app'}}"
DATA_ROOT="{{$env.DATA_ROOT || '/data'}}"
TENANT_ID="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_id}}"
JOB_TYPE="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.job_type}}"
REQ='{{$node["Normalize Input"].json.request_json}}'
NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
JOB_ID="mkt_${TENANT_ID}_$(date +%s)"
OUT_DIR="$DATA_ROOT/generated/draft/marketing-jobs"
OUT_PATH="$OUT_DIR/${JOB_ID}.json"
mkdir -p "$OUT_DIR"
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=process.argv;const req=JSON.parse(p[4]);const doc={schema_name:'job_runtime_state_schema',schema_version:'1.0.0',job_id:req.job_id||p[1],job_type:p[2],tenant_id:p[3],state:'queued',status:'pending',attempt:1,max_attempts:3,inputs:{request:req,brand_url:req.brand_url,competitor_url:req.competitor_url},outputs:{current_stage:'research',stage_status:{research:'queued',strategy:'paused',production:'paused',publish:'paused'},structured_status_updates:[{at:p[5],state:'queued',status:'pending',step:'research',details:{source:'brand_campaign_webhook'}}]},history:[{at:p[5],state:'queued',status:'pending',note:'cohesive brand campaign workflow accepted job'}],created_at:p[5],updated_at:p[5]};fs.writeFileSync(p[6],JSON.stringify(doc,null,2));process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:'accepted',tenant_id:p[3],job_type:p[2],job_id:req.job_id||p[1],job_state:'queued',job_runtime_path:p[6]}));" "$JOB_ID" "$JOB_TYPE" "$TENANT_ID" "$REQ" "$NOW" "$OUT_PATH"
